title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are out of date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is up to date
scenario: Language change in Device Settings fails to apply to smart charge case when earbuds require firmware update but case is already up to date
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name (e.g., Voyager Free 60+).
4. Ensure the earbuds/headset are on an outdated firmware version, while the smart charge case/stand is already up to date.
5. In Device Settings, locate the Language option and change it to a different language.
6. Observe the app behavior — a firmware update (DFU) prompt should appear for the earbuds/headset.
7. Proceed with the firmware update for the earbuds/headset.
8. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
9. After the update, check the language setting on the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+).
10. Verify that the language change is reflected on all components: earbuds/headset, smart charge case/stand, and the app.
expected: The language change and firmware update (DFU) complete successfully for all components. The smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) reflects the language change after the update.
